shorts.title: Safe and Alive: Why You Need Both
shorts.description: Everyone says find someone safe OR alive. They're wrong. The real love makes you both. Here's what that moment looks like. #Shorts #Poetry #Love #Relationships #RealLove
shorts.hook_visual: Close-up of two people's faces in candlelight, eyes meeting. Text overlay appears suddenly: 'Safe or Alive? Choose wrong.'
shorts.end_screen_cta: Text overlay fades in: 'Which have you found?' with link to full essay in bio.

shorts.title: Safe But Alive — Love Holds Both
shorts.description: Most love songs collapse into safe or alive. This poem refuses to choose — it gives you both, at the same time, without apology. The person worth building a life with steadies you while you expand.

shorts.title: What Love Stories Get Wrong About Longing
shorts.description: It's not about being adored. It's about watching them light up for someone else and feeling that ache — the one that wants your worlds to collapse into one. That's the fantasy nobody writes about. #Poetry #Shorts #LovePoetry

shorts.title: Embarrassment Is the Key to Love
shorts.description: The vulnerability isn't being caught loving someone. It's wanting something so badly you can already feel its texture — and knowing you'd risk everything for it. That's where love actually lives. #Poetry #Shorts #WordsThatHit

shorts.title: The Person Your Whole World Would Also Choose
shorts.description: It's not the fantasy of being chosen. It's the fantasy of being chosen by someone your whole world would also choose. When the circles of your life collapse into one — that's the ache this poem catches. #Shorts #Poetry #Love

shorts.title: When Love Becomes Real in Your Family's Eyes
shorts.description: The speaker doesn't melt because they're adored. They melt watching their beloved light up with someone else. That's the ache of wanting integration — of wanting them to not just be a guest, but someone who was always supposed to be there. #Shorts #Poetry #Love

shorts.title: Safe Doesn't Mean Unchanged. Alive Doesn't Mean Reckless.
shorts.description: Love isn't complete until you can imagine the person fully alive in the lives of the people you came from. Safe and alive — both at once, neither cancelling the other out. That's the whole poem. #Shorts #Poetry #Love
